mapper.sql: select t.transaction_id, t.family_id, f.family_name, t.member_id, m.member_name, t.account_id, a.account_name, t.asset_id, s.asset_name, t.transaction_type, t.trade_date, t.quantity, t.price, t.fee, t.amount, t.del_flag, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, t.remark from fin_transaction t left join fin_family f on f.family_id = t.family_id left join fin_member_account m on m.member_id = t.member_id left join fin_holding_account a on a.account_id = t.account_id left join fin_asset s on s.asset_id = t.asset_id
mapper.insert: insert into fin_transaction( family_id, member_id, account_id, asset_id, transaction_type, trade_date, quantity, price, fee, amount, remark, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{familyId}, #{memberId}, #{accountId}, #{assetId}, #{transactionType}, #{tradeDate}, #{quantity}, #{price}, #{fee}, #{amount}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
